mapper.sql: A.NTACS_CONN_HIST_SEQ, A.PIP_FCLT_INET, A.SFCLT_PROMPT_NM, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SAVAIL_YN , A.NRESULT_CD, A.SRESULT_MSG, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_TACS_CONN_HIST A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM TB_TACS_CONN_HIST A
